positive: Stylized vector illustration of a celestial forest scene. A winding root system forms a path through bioluminescent foliage and glowing flora. Central elements include large, stylized Moonflowers and constellations rendered as glowing geometric shapes. The composition should be circular and highly symmetrical, with a strong central contrast between deep indigo-black backgrounds and vibrant neon aquamarine and gold accents. Minimalist line work defines the botanicals and celestial bodies, suitable for screen printing. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, flat illustration style, perfect for apparel print.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, mutated, grainy, overly complex, busy background
